name: Apricot & Cucumber Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 each Orange, juiced and rind grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the apricots in the vegetable stock with the grated orange rind for 2 to 3 hours.
2. Add the orange juice and simmer for 45 minutes.
3. Cut 8 thin slices from the cucumber for garnish. Peel and roughly chop the remainder.
4. Fry the onion in oil over medium heat for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the curry powder and chopped cucumber, then cook for 2 minutes.
6. Puree the apricots with the vegetable stock and the cucumber mixture.
7. Return the purée to the pan and gently heat. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Serve the soup garnished with floating cucumber slices topped with pumpkin seeds. Black rye bread makes a good accompaniment.
